what_changes_vs_baseline: Reference officielle: close[t-1] vs VWAP[t-1], next open, always-in-market RTH, flat overnight.
notes: Exact paper logic: previous close relative to session VWAP drives the next bar position, always in market during RTH, flat overnight.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Meme signal que la baseline paper, mais sous sizing futures fixe et couts repo_realistic.
notes: Same signal logic as the paper baseline, but priced with realistic futures costs.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Baseline paper gatee par une fenetre horaire simple pour n'autoriser que certaines entrees et flips.
notes: Paper signal with allowed entries and reversals only in the profitable time buckets.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Baseline paper avec plafond dur sur le nombre de flips/trades par jour.
notes: Paper signal with a hard cap on the number of daily flips/trades.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Baseline paper gatee par un filtre de pente VWAP et un filtre simple de distance au VWAP.
notes: Paper signal gated by previous-bar VWAP slope alignment and a simple distance-to-VWAP filter.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Baseline paper avec kill switches journaliers simples: pertes max, stop daily, plafond de trades.
notes: Paper signal with daily loss and trade-count controls.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Variante discrete reclaim simple avec pente VWAP, buffer ATR et sortie sur recross/stop/session close.
notes: VWAP reclaim after compression, confirmed by positive or negative VWAP slope.

what_changes_vs_baseline: Variante reclaim simple avec overlay prop: fenetres horaires, cap de trades, daily stop et deleveraging.
notes: Reclaim variant with time filter, hard daily stop, trade cap, and position deleveraging after a losing streak.
